description.tr: Road trailer LTL and FTL lane: chargeable weight and ADR workflows—invoice-led B2B flows sit on the commercial goods page.
description.en: Road trailer LTL and FTL lane: chargeable weight and ADR workflows—invoice-led B2B flows sit on the commercial goods page.

keyword.tr: LTL FTL road trailer UK Turkey, chargeable weight freight, ADR dangerous goods approval
keyword.en: LTL FTL road trailer UK Turkey, chargeable weight freight, ADR dangerous goods approval

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Chargeable weight rules apply. Dangerous goods and batteries need separate approvals.
